details.description:
Modern 1 Bed / 1 Bath at 584 4th Ave- Gowanus
Welcome to 584 4th Ave, a brand-new luxury development in the heart of Gowanus. This spacious 1-bedroom features floor-to-ceiling windows with sweeping views of Manhattan, the Statue of Liberty, and city bridges.
Enjoy premium amenities including:
Elevator
Rooftop with panoramic views
Fitness center
In-unit washer/dryer
Located near Park Slope with easy access to the F, G, D, N, and R trains, this building offers the perfect mix of style, comfort, and convenience.
Pets allowed upon approval.
Schedule a tour today!

amenities.other: Dishwasher

details.description:
Modern Studio at 584 4th Ave- Gowanus
Welcome to 584 4th Ave, a brand-new luxury development in the heart of Gowanus. This spacious Studio features floor-to-ceiling windows with sweeping views of Manhattan, the Statue of Liberty, and city bridges.
Enjoy premium amenities including:
Elevator
Rooftop with panoramic views
Fitness center
In-unit washer/dryer
Located near Park Slope with easy access to the F, G, D, N, and R trains, this building offers the perfect mix of style, comfort, and convenience.
Pets allowed upon approval.
Schedule a tour today!

amenities.other: Dishwasher

details.description:
The Baltic Canal ? Modern Living in Boerum Hill
Studios, 1-; 2-BR homes with oversized windows, white oak floors, custom kitchens, spa-style baths, and in-unit or on-site laundry. Select residences offer private balconies or terraces.
Amenities: Bike room, elevator, package room, gym, media room, and multiple outdoor spaces ? deck, garden, patio; panoramic roof deck.
Unbeatable location at the crossroads of Boerum Hill, Gowanus; Park Slope, near Whole Foods, top restaurants, boutique shops; F/G/R trains.
📅 Schedule your tour today and make The Baltic Canal your next home.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C

details.description:
June 1st Move-In Spacious 2-Bedroom Duplex with Shared Backyard ? Right by Dumbo; Vinegar Hill
Be the first to live in this freshly updated duplex in the Downtown Brooklyn area. The apartment offers two bedrooms upstairs with a sleek, modern bathroom, while the lower level features a large open living space?perfect for relaxing or entertaining.
You?ll also enjoy access to a shared backyard (only one other unit), giving you a rare bit of outdoor space in the city.
Set just minutes from Dumbo and Vinegar Hill, the location puts you close to multiple subway lines, great restaurants, and everyday essentials. Wegmans, Whole Foods, and Trader Joe?s are all nearby, making errands easy.
A clean, comfortable layout in a super convenient neighborhood?definitely worth checking out.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Duplex, Private Outdoor Space

details.description:
Spacious 1BR in a modern elevator building with one of the biggest living rooms you?ll find?room for dining, lounging, and working. Bright and airy with oversized windows, a large kitchen, great storage, and in-unit washer/dryer. A/C in every room, big closets, sunny bedroom.
Building perks: gym, roof deck, pet spa, parking (for a fee), lounge, bike storage. No broker fee.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C

details.description:
Beautiful 2BR near L train (Grand St). Queen bedrooms, great light, open kitchen/living, dishwasher + stainless steel, wood floors.
Email for quickest response ? no fee!

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors

details.description:
Spacious Studo!
Bright and modern Studio- walk to Myrtle-Wyckoff (L/M). Surrounded by parks, shops, and dining options.
The unit features windows throughout for great natural light, in-unit laundry, and access to building amenities including a rooftop, gym, bike storage, and more.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit

details.description:

Building perks: gym, roof deck, pet spa, parking (for a fee), lounge, bike storage. No broker fee.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C

details.description:
Modern waterfront building in Greenpoint with a finished rooftop offering sweeping views of the Manhattan skyline and the Williamsburg Bridge.
Building amenities include a fitness center, bike storage, business center, and available parking.
Residences feature central air, dishwashers, hardwood floors, large windows, and contemporary finishes.
Photos shown are of similar units in the building.

amenities.other: Dishwasher

details.description:
Virtual tours available!
Beautiful 2 bed / 1 bath apartment in Bushwick, prime location! This apartment features a spacious living room, queen-sized bedrooms, stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout. You'll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Mominette, Sea Wolf, Three Diamond Door, Precious Metal, The Rookery, Archie's, Heavy Woods, Idlewild, Clara's, Yours Sincerely, Chuko, Los Hermanos, Wheelhouse.
Short commute to Manhattan; easy access to the rest of Brooklyn's hottest neighborhoods. Only blocks from the L train, and a short walk to the J, M trains.

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors

details.description:
107 Moore Street is a boutique rental in East Williamsburg offering studio, one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartments. Units feature hardwood floors, central air, in-unit washer/dryer, and dishwashers. Select apartments include private outdoor space and roof access.
The building also offers laundry in the basement and a shared rooftop.
Great location:
Easy access to the L, JM, and G trains Close to Trader Joe?s and Whole Foods Surrounded by restaurants, bars, and cafes

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Roof Access

details.description:
Brand New Modern Luxury Building ? Full Amenities
Beautifully designed residences featuring:
? Hardwood floors throughout ? High ceilings; great natural light ? Generous closet space ? Private outdoor terrace ? perfect for relaxing or entertaining ? Gourmet kitchen with marble island; stainless steel appliances ? Dishwasher included ? Sleek modern bathroom with deep soaking tub ? Central heating; A/C ? Video intercom system
Building Amenities:
? Fully equipped gym ? Resident lounge ? Game room ? Co-working space ? Laundry room ? Bike storage ? Package room ? Rooftop with stunning views ? Private parking available
Only a 3-minute walk to the B; Q trains at E 16th St / Ave M
Guarantors welcome.
Reach out to schedule a tour.

amenities.other: A/C, Balcony/Terrace, Dishwasher

details.description:
Modern Crown Heights Living
Welcome to 1499 Bedford Ave, a newly built rental offering stylish homes in one of Brooklyn?s most vibrant neighborhoods. Located near Eastern Parkway with easy access to multiple subway lines, Prospect Park, and Grand Army Plaza.
Building Highlights
Fitness center; resident lounge Rooftop + outdoor terrace Pet wash; laundry facilities Workspaces; package room
Apartment Features
Bright, open layouts with large windows Select units with balconies or terraces Modern kitchens with islands (in select homes)
HPD Income Guidelines
2 people: $144K?$168K 3 people: up to $189K 4 people: up to $210K 5 people: up to $227K
Households must be related or show financial interdependence.

amenities.other: Balcony/Terrace

details.description:
Welcome to the brand new luxury building located in the charming Vinegar Hill area of DUMBO! Indulge in breathtaking views of both the Manhattan Bridge and Brooklyn Bridge. Explore the numerous nearby parks, including John St Park, Main St Park, Trinity Park, Brooklyn Bridge Park, Cadman Plaza Park, Whitman Park, and many more! Treat yourself to the delightful offerings of local restaurants such as Bridge Coffee, and for those late-night cravings, you'll find beloved spots like Shake Shack just a few blocks away. This residence combines the classic essence of old-school Brooklyn with the allure of modern luxury living, making it the perfect place to call home.
Convenience is key, as the building is situated near the A, C, and F train lines, as well as the B57, B62, and B69 bus routes.
Unit features include:
Hardwood floors Stainless steel kitchen appliances Dishwasher and microwave Central air conditioning and heating Private balconies (inquire for availability) In-unit laundry (inquire for availability)
Building amenities encompass: Courtyard Roof deck Elevator Laundry room Fitness center Recreation room Tenant lounge Package room Bike storage Pet-friendly accommodations To secure your new home, all you need is the first month's rent and a security deposit. Best of all, there is no broker fee involved!
Experience the epitome of luxury living in a prime location. Don't miss out on this incredible opportunity!

amenities.other: Balcony/Terrace, Central A/C, Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Roof Access, Shared Outdoor Space, Washer/Dryer In Unit

details.description:
BRAND NEW LUXURY BUILDING in the beautiful Vinegar Hill area of DUMBO!! Enjoy unbelievable views across both the Manhattan Bridge and Brooklyn Bridge. Visit the countless parks nearby such as John St Park, Main St Park, Trinity Park, Brooklyn Bridge Park, Cadman Plaza Park, Whitman Park and even more! Become a patron of some of the long standing and delicious LOCAL local restaurants such as Bridge Coffee and still enjoy those late night cravings spots we pretend we don't know and love (*cough Shake Shack) just a few blocks further. Take a little old school Brooklyn, mix in some new luxury living, and that's how you'll end up falling in love with your new home here!
Conveniently located off the A, C and F trains as well as the B57, B62, B69 bus routes.
UNIT FEATURES: Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Dishwasher; Microwave Central A/C; Heat Inquire for Private Balconies! Inquire for IN UNIT laundry!
BUILDING FEATURES: Courtyard Roof Deck Elevator Laundry Room Fitness Center Rec Room Tenant Lounge Package Room Bike Storage Pets Allowed
First; Security NO BROKER FEE

amenities.other: Balcony/Terrace, Central A/C, Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Roof Access, Shared Outdoor Space, Washer/Dryer In Unit

details.description:
Introducing a brand new luxury building located in the charming Vinegar Hill area of DUMBO! Indulge in breathtaking views spanning both the Manhattan Bridge and Brooklyn Bridge. Immerse yourself in the abundance of nearby parks, including John St Park, Main St Park, Trinity Park, Brooklyn Bridge Park, Cadman Plaza Park, Whitman Park, and many more. Delight in the long-established, delectable local restaurants such as Bridge Coffee, while still satisfying those late-night cravings at spots we all secretly adore (*cough Shake Shack), just a few blocks away. Experience the perfect blend of old-school Brooklyn charm and modern luxury living, and prepare to fall in love with your new home here.
Convenience is key, as the building is conveniently located near the A, C, and F trains, as well as the B57, B62, and B69 bus routes.
Unit Features: Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen with Dishwasher; Microwave Central A/C; Heat Private Balconies available upon inquiry In-unit laundry available upon inquiry
Building Features: Rooftop Deck Laundry Room Fitness Center Recreation Room Tenant Lounge Package Room Bike Storage Pets Allowed First; Security deposit required No broker fee!
Come and experience the epitome of luxury living in this exceptional new building. Don't miss out on this opportunity to make it your new home.

amenities.other: Balcony/Terrace, Central A/C, Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Roof Access, Shared Outdoor Space, Washer/Dryer In Unit

details.description:
Easily practice safe social distancing with your own?Private. Unobstructed. Views. Of Manhattan. Built-in 2019, You?ll enjoy a generously-spaced 3-bed option, in the beautiful neighborhood of Astoria, yeah, green space and good bites, for days!
You?ll enjoy a super sun-lit 3 bedroom unit that can each room comfortably fit a queen-sized bed, dresser, tall wardrobe, make it your studio or even home gym or playroom for a little-one.
Make dinner without, having to clear your workspace all the time, and having a pet to help keep you company! After dinner, take a stroll through the neighborhood and check out everything.
Lucky for you you?re nestled on a residential block, close to shops, stores, and Transportation options are the N/Q at Broadway, and R/M at Steinway, an estimated 20 min. to Midtown? for those who commute.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Private Outdoor Space

details.description:
NOW WITH NO BROKER FEE!!
The Kent House is in arguably THE MOST desirable neighborhood in Brooklyn. Right on the Williamsburg Waterfront with gorgeous river and city views, all the restaurants, coffee shops, bars, art and music venues, plant shops, parks, farmers markets, grocers, and absolutely anything and everything else you could desire right outside your door.
Conveniently located off the J. M, and L trains, as well as the B32, B62, and Q59 bus routes.
UNIT FEATURES: Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Dishwasher Central A/C and Heat Private Balcony Washer/Dyer IN UNIT Excellent light from extra large windows
BUILDING FEATURES: Bike Room Courtyard Elevator Fitness Center Laundry Room Tenant Lounge Package Room Finished Roof Deck

amenities.other: Balcony/Terrace, Central A/C, Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Private Outdoor Space, Roof Access, Shared Outdoor Space, Washer/Dryer In Unit

Visit the countless parks nearby such as John St Park, Main St Park, Trinity Park, Brooklyn Bridge Park, Cadman Plaza Park, Whitman Park and even more! Become a patron of some of the long standing and delicious LOCAL local restaurants such as Bridge Coffee and still enjoy those late night cravings spots we pretend we don't know and love (*cough Shake Shack) just a few blocks further. Take a little old school Brooklyn, mix in some new luxury living, and that's how you'll end up falling in love with your new home here!

details.description: Bright 1-bedroom in a full-service amenity building with elevator, laundry, lounge, and rooftop deck with skyline views. Pets upon approval. Close to N/W at Broadway and R/M at Steinway?quick Midtown commute.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Private Outdoor Space

details.description:
? One Fifty Lawrence ? Elevated Living in the Heart of Downtown Brooklyn
Welcome to One Fifty Lawrence, a modern 25-story tower redefining Brooklyn living. Nestled between Fulton and Willoughby Streets, this striking new residence blends refined design, thoughtful amenities, and unbeatable convenience ? just steps from the Jay St?MetroTech subway hub.
Inside, discover bright studio, one-, and two-bedroom apartments with expansive windows, high ceilings, and sleek finishes. Each home is crafted for comfort and style, featuring top-of-the-line appliances, in-unit laundry, and energy-efficient systems.
Residents enjoy access to an impressive amenity collection: a state-of-the-art fitness center, rooftop terrace with sweeping skyline views, resident lounge, and co-working spaces ? all within a pet-friendly community.
At One Fifty Lawrence, you?re surrounded by everything Downtown Brooklyn offers ? premier shopping, dining, and cultural destinations ? while being minutes from Manhattan and the rest of the borough.
Modern design. Urban energy. Unmatched convenience. This is One Fifty Lawrence.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Stainless steel appliances, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C

details.description:
2 bedroom 1.5 bath
Duplex!
Available 3/1 Pets welcome

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors, Duplex

details.description:
2 bedroom + balcony!
Amazing location- where Prospect Heights meets Crown Heights- steps to Prospect park and Franklin Ave! Off of 2/3/4/5 and shuttle trains for a quick commute!
Full amenity luxury new development featuring: Virtual Doorman Elevator Gym Laundry Room Roof Deck Garage Parking

amenities.other: Balcony/Terrace, Microwave, Private Outdoor Space, Central A/C

details.description:
Discover this exceptional apartment nestled in the vibrant neighborhood of Carroll Gardens, Brooklyn. This stunning residence seamlessly blends modern convenience with classic charm, featuring a recently updated kitchen outfitted with sleek stainless steel appliances, including a microwave and dishwasher, along with gleaming hardwood floors throughout.
The space radiates sophistication with high-end finishes, soaring ceilings, and large windows that flood the home with natural light. Each bedroom is generously sized, comfortably accommodating queen-size beds, creating a restful and inviting retreat.
Enjoy the convenience of an in-unit washer/dryer and the comfort of central air conditioning for year-round ease. A virtual doorman adds an extra layer of security and peace of mind.
One of the most notable features of this apartment is the private yard,ideal for outdoor dining, entertaining guests, or simply unwinding in your own peaceful green space. In addition, the building includes a charming shared courtyard, offering even more opportunities to enjoy the outdoors.
With the Carroll St (F/G) subway station and major bus routes just a short walk away, commuting is effortless. You'll also be surrounded by an array of local shops, cozy cafes, and top-rated restaurants, placing you at the center of the best that Carroll Gardens has to offer.
Don?t miss your chance to call this remarkable apartment home, schedule your viewing today!

amenities.other: A/C, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Shared Outdoor Space
